title: Resource Pose Schema
description: Canonical TELEMETRY contract for a resource's live spatial position, greenfield from ROS luhtech_msgs/VoxelPose.msg. Per the STATE-vs-TELEMETRY architecture split (d-2026-07-05-ectropy-scaling-strategy), pose is transient wire data carried on Redis pub/sub and the /ws/voxel-stream resource:pose message type (Phase alpha-1) -- it is NOT a DB-persisted entity, so unlike voxel-group.schema.json this contract has no $id/URN identity of its own; identity flows through resourceUrn (the resource being described) and lastSeq (monotonic per-resource ordering for the snapshot+delta+catchup protocol alpha-1 requires). Structural conventions ($schema plain-string, definitions._metadata, additionalProperties:false, mirrored urn/resourceType/availability/activity definitions) mirror voxel-group.schema.json and resource-status.schema.json per Phase alpha-0's instruction to mirror the canonical pattern. Contract per DISPATCH-EB-CLI-FULL-ARC-EXECUTION-TARBALL-2026-07-14 Phase alpha-0.

urn.description: MIRROR of https://schemas.luh.tech/_definitions/graph.schema.json#/definitions/urn, same inline-mirror convention as voxel-group.schema.json#/definitions/urn (public endpoint is fail-closed per SR #185; byte-equality is CI-asserted, not $ref-resolved).

resourceType.description: MIRROR of resource-status.schema.json#/definitions/resourceType. Byte-equality is CI-asserted, not $ref-resolved (same convention as the urn mirror above, and as voxel-group.schema.json's own definitions.urn note) -- pose and status are two independently-transported messages describing the same resource, so this file cannot $ref across to resource-status.schema.json directly.

availability.description: MIRROR of resource-status.schema.json#/definitions/availability. Optional here: a pose-only delta (position changed, status did not) may omit it, meaning unchanged from the last known value per the snapshot+delta protocol.

activity.description: MIRROR of resource-status.schema.json#/definitions/activity. Optional here, same delta-omission semantics as availability above.

point3.description: World-space coordinate triple (maps to ROS geometry_msgs/Point, VoxelPose.msg's `position` field). MIRROR of voxel-group.schema.json#/definitions/point3.

$schema.description: Schema declaration. Canonical: https://schemas.luh.tech/ectropy/resource/resource-pose.schema.json. Plain string per d-2026-06-22 canon (const antipattern dropped).

resourceUrn.description: Corresponds to VoxelPose.msg's resource_urn field. Format urn:luhtech:ectropy:resource:{id}.

voxelUrn.description: Corresponds to VoxelPose.msg's voxel_urn field (urn:luhtech:ectropy:voxel:{id}). Optional: a resource between zones or OFFLINE may have no current voxel anchor.

confidence.description: Corresponds to VoxelPose.msg's confidence field (float64 in the .msg; constrained here to the documented 0-1 range).

lastUpdate.description: Corresponds to VoxelPose.msg's stamp field (builtin_interfaces/Time in the .msg).

lastSeq.description: Monotonic per-resource sequence number. Required by Phase alpha-1's snapshot+delta+catchup protocol on /ws/voxel-stream: a client resuming after a gap requests everything with lastSeq greater than its last-received value; a slow client's queue coalesces to the highest lastSeq per resource rather than replaying every intermediate frame.

authoredFrom: infrastructure/uro-sim/colcon_ws/src/luhtech_msgs/msg/VoxelPose.msg (greenfield -- no prior schema of any status existed for this .msg)
x-authoring.producerOfRecord: humsx_simulator_node.py (/hsx/{id}/location), robsx_simulator_node.py (/rsx/{id}/location) publish luhtech_msgs/VoxelPose today. Phase alpha-2's ROS->Redis producer bridge is the first consumer that decodes VoxelPose.msg INTO this typed contract and republishes it as the alpha-1 resource:pose WS message; the ROS .msg itself is unchanged by this contract.
